hero.title: We create content that makes people hungry.
hero.subtitle: Creative agency specialized in food & beverage photography and videography, helping your restaurant shine both at the table and on social media.

about.title: About Us
about.description: We are a creative agency specialized in food and beverage photography and videography. We help restaurants and cocktail bars showcase their essence through visual content that sparks emotions and builds real connections with their customers.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about our services

questions.a1: We offer photography, videography, marketing strategy, and brand identity services.
questions.q2: How long does a project take?
questions.a2: Project timelines vary depending on scope and complexity. We'll provide a detailed timeline during our initial consultation.
questions.q3: Do you work with small businesses?
questions.a3: Yes! We work with businesses of all sizes, from startups to established corporations.

footer.description: Creative agency specialized in food & beverage photography and videography, helping your restaurant shine both at the table and on social media.
